# PHIL.170 ? Coopetition Mindset

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** competitive_strategy
**Subcategory:** coopetition_mindset
**Domain:** COMPETITIVE_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Sometimes cooperating with competitors creates more value than competing

## Application
Identify win-win scenarios, build standards together, compete and cooperate strategically
